title: grandMA2 MCP Server — Tool Rights Matrix
description: Maps all 109 MCP tools to grandMA2 native rights levels and OAuth scopes. Machine-readable reference for the MA2Right implementation sprint.

none.description: No programming rights. Read-only monitoring, discovery, and state inspection. Available to all logged-in console users including 'guest' (rights=0).

playback.description: Can trigger playback: Go, Flash, Off, Pause executors, control timecode/timers. No programmer or preset access.

presets.description: Can update existing presets, set attributes in programmer, park/unpark fixtures. Cannot store new cues or sequences.

program.description: Full programming access: store/edit cues, sequences, groups, macros, effects, filters. Export objects. Core show-building rights.

setup.description: Technical director access: patch fixtures, import fixture types, console setup, network config.

admin.description: Full admin: user management, show load/delete, session management, system admin. Requires Admin (rights=5) Telnet session.

tools.name: create_fixture_group
tools.description: Create and store a fixture group.

tools.name: execute_sequence
tools.description: Go/GoBack/Goto on a sequence or executor.

tools.name: send_raw_command
tools.description: Send an arbitrary grandMA2 command string. Raised from gma2:programmer:write — raw commands have no ceiling.

tools.name: navigate_console
tools.description: CD navigation in the console tree.

tools.name: get_console_location
tools.description: Return the current prompt/location.

tools.name: list_console_destination
tools.description: List objects at a CD destination.

tools.name: scan_console_indexes
tools.description: Scan numeric indexes at a destination.

tools.name: set_node_property
tools.description: Set a property on a console node via assign.

tools.name: set_intensity
tools.description: Set dimmer intensity in programmer.

tools.name: apply_preset
tools.description: Recall a preset into programmer.

tools.name: store_current_cue
tools.description: Store programmer content to a cue.

tools.name: get_object_info
tools.description: Info command on any pool object.

tools.name: clear_programmer
tools.description: Clear programmer (all, selection, or active).

tools.name: set_attribute
tools.description: Set a fixture attribute value in programmer.

tools.name: park_fixture
tools.description: Park a fixture or DMX address at a value.

tools.name: unpark_fixture
tools.description: Unpark a fixture or DMX address.

tools.name: run_macro
tools.description: Execute a stored macro.

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a pool object (cue, group, preset, etc.).

tools.name: copy_or_move_object
tools.description: Copy or move a pool object to a new slot.

tools.name: store_new_preset
tools.description: Store programmer to a new preset slot.

tools.name: query_object_list
tools.description: List any pool type.

tools.name: list_system_variables
tools.description: Return all 26 grandMA2 built-in system variables.

tools.name: playback_action
tools.description: Dispatch Go/Flash/On/Off/Pause/Release on executors.

tools.name: manage_variable
tools.description: Set/add global or user variables.

tools.name: label_or_appearance
tools.description: Label or set the appearance of a pool object.

tools.name: assign_object
tools.description: Assign a pool object to another (sequence→executor etc.).

tools.name: edit_object
tools.description: Open an object in the editor (Edit keyword).

tools.name: remove_content
tools.description: Remove attributes or content from programmer/cue.

tools.name: store_object
tools.description: Generic store to any pool object type.

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: RAG semantic search over the server codebase.

tools.name: set_executor_level
tools.description: Set fader level on an executor (0-100).

tools.name: navigate_page
tools.description: Page +/- or jump to a specific executor page.

tools.name: select_feature
tools.description: Select a Feature (attribute group) in the programmer.

tools.name: select_preset_type
tools.description: Switch the active PresetType view.

tools.name: browse_preset_type
tools.description: Navigate the PresetType/Feature/Attribute tree.

tools.name: modify_selection
tools.description: Add or remove fixtures from the current selection.

tools.name: adjust_value_relative
tools.description: Apply a relative +/- value in programmer.

tools.name: control_timecode
tools.description: Start/stop/reset a timecode show. Lowered from gma2:sequence:edit — timecode triggering is playback-level in MA2.

tools.name: control_timer
tools.description: Control a console timer (start/stop/reset). Lowered from gma2:sequence:edit — timer control is playback-level.

tools.name: undo_last_action
tools.description: Undo the last console action (Oops).

tools.name: toggle_console_mode
tools.description: Toggle Blind/Highlight/Freeze/Blackout. Outer gate: gma2:playback:go. Blind mode adds inner has_scope(gma2:programmer:write) guard — Blind puts console in programming layer.

tools.name: update_cue_data
tools.description: Update cue data (Update keyword with options).

tools.name: set_cue_timing
tools.description: Set fade/delay timing on a cue.

tools.name: select_fixtures_by_group
tools.description: Select fixtures via group reference.

tools.name: control_executor
tools.description: Assign function (Swop/Top/Stomp/Temp) on an executor.

tools.name: load_cue
tools.description: Load next/previous cue without executing it.

tools.name: cut_paste_object
tools.description: Cut and paste a pool object to a new slot.

tools.name: clone_object
tools.description: Clone a pool object (sequence, cue, etc.).

tools.name: fix_locate_fixture
tools.description: Fix or locate a fixture (Fix/Locate keywords).

tools.name: manipulate_selection
tools.description: Invert, Align, Shuffle selection.

tools.name: block_unblock_cue
tools.description: Block or unblock cue tracking.

tools.name: get_executor_status
tools.description: Read current state of executors.

tools.name: store_timecode_event
tools.description: Store a timecode event to a timecode show.

tools.name: set_sequence_property
tools.description: Assign a property (loop, speed, etc.) to a sequence.

tools.name: save_show
tools.description: Save the current show file. Lowered from gma2:cue:store — SaveShow is available to rights=1 (Playback) in MA2.

tools.name: store_cue_with_timing
tools.description: Store a cue with specific fade/delay timing in one call.

tools.name: select_executor
tools.description: Set the currently selected executor.

tools.name: remove_from_programmer
tools.description: Remove fixtures/attributes from programmer.

tools.name: assign_cue_trigger
tools.description: Assign a trigger type to a cue (Go, Time, Follow, etc.).

tools.name: assign_executor_property
tools.description: Assign executor options (priority, autostart, etc.).

tools.name: if_filter
tools.description: Apply an If condition filter in the programmer.

tools.name: save_recall_view
tools.description: Store or recall a screen view layout. Lowered from gma2:setup:console — view management is a programmer operation.

tools.name: export_objects
tools.description: Export pool objects to a file. Lowered from gma2:setup:console — Export is available to Program-level users in MA2.

tools.name: import_objects
tools.description: Import a pool object file into the show.

tools.name: import_fixture_type
tools.description: Import a fixture type XML file into the patch.

tools.name: import_fixture_layer
tools.description: Import a fixture layer XML to extend a fixture type.

tools.name: generate_fixture_layer_xml
tools.description: Generate a fixture layer XML document (pure Python, no console I/O). Lowered from gma2:fixture:import — no console I/O occurs.

tools.name: list_fixtures
tools.description: List patched fixtures.

tools.name: list_sequence_cues
tools.description: List cues in a sequence.

tools.name: highlight_fixtures
tools.description: Enable or toggle Highlight mode.

tools.name: release_executor
tools.description: Release (off) an executor.

tools.name: blackout_toggle
tools.description: Toggle the grand master blackout.

tools.name: list_shows
tools.description: List available show files on the console.

tools.name: load_show
tools.description: Load a show file (replaces current show).

tools.name: new_show
tools.description: Create a new empty show.

tools.name: get_variable
tools.description: Read a single system or user variable.

tools.name: list_preset_pool
tools.description: List preset pool counts per preset type.

tools.name: list_undo_history
tools.description: List recent undo (oops) history.

tools.name: list_fixture_types
tools.description: List fixture types in the show.

tools.name: list_layers
tools.description: List fixture layers defined in the show.

tools.name: list_universes
tools.description: List DMX universes configured on the console.

tools.name: list_library
tools.description: List fixture library objects.

tools.name: manage_matricks
tools.description: Set MAtricks (Interleave/Blocks/Groups/Wings/Filter) state.

tools.name: store_matricks_preset
tools.description: Store a MAtricks state as a named preset.

tools.name: create_matricks_library
tools.description: Generate and import a full MAtricks preset library (625 items).

tools.name: discover_filter_attributes
tools.description: Discover the fixture attribute names for filter construction.

tools.name: create_filter_library
tools.description: Generate and import a full attribute filter library.

tools.name: browse_patch_schedule
tools.description: Browse the live patch schedule (fixture→DMX mapping).

tools.name: patch_fixture
tools.description: Assign a fixture to a DMX address.

tools.name: unpatch_fixture
tools.description: Remove a fixture from its DMX address.

tools.name: set_fixture_type_property
tools.description: Set a property on a fixture type in the patch.

tools.name: check_pool_availability
tools.description: Find free slots in any pool type.

tools.name: discover_object_names
tools.description: List all object names in a pool for wildcard construction.

tools.name: list_tool_categories
tools.description: List ML-clustered tool categories.

tools.name: recluster_tools
tools.description: Re-run K-Means tool clustering.

tools.name: get_similar_tools
tools.description: Find tools similar to a named tool.

tools.name: suggest_tool_for_task
tools.description: Suggest the best tool for a natural-language task description.

tools.name: list_console_users
tools.description: List console user accounts. Raised from gma2:state:read — user enumeration is sensitive admin data.

tools.name: create_console_user
tools.description: Create or overwrite a console user account.

tools.name: assign_world_to_user_profile
tools.description: Assign a World to a user profile.

tools.name: inspect_sessions
tools.description: Inspect active Telnet session pool state. Raised from gma2:state:read — session pool data is sensitive admin data.

tools.name: delete_user
tools.description: Delete a console user account (slot 1 protected).

tools.name: browse_effect_library
tools.description: Browse the MA2 built-in effect library.

tools.name: browse_macro_library
tools.description: Browse the stored macro library.

tools.name: browse_plugin_library
tools.description: Browse the MA2 plugin library.

tools.name: list_fader_modules
tools.description: List connected fader/wing modules.

tools.name: list_update_history
tools.description: List programming update history.

tools.name: delete_show
tools.description: Delete a show file from the console.

tools.name: assign_temp_fader
tools.description: Assign a temporary fader to an executor or sequence.
